title: 'Erek #0751
definition:
Erech = "long"

 1) a city 40 miles (64 km) northwest of Ur toward Babylon on the left
    bank of the Euphrates river
nasbUsage:

    bank of the Euphrates river

    NASB:  a city in Bab.
